content: Barge-in bugs: pipecat #3986 — interruption during TTS synthesis before BotStartedSpeakingFrame leaves _bot_speaking False so TTS websocket keeps streaming and audio plays after interruption. #2460 — websocket transports without proper VAD wiring never emit user-started-speaking so barge-in silently doesn't work. Correct interruption = stop TTS, flush output audio buffers client+server, truncate assistant context to what was actually spoken. Also hard-cut audio sounds abrupt (#3985 graceful release proposal). False barge-in from bot hearing itself when AEC weak.
